title: Amazon's Bahrain data center targeted by Iran for support of U.S. military, state media says
summary_full: Amazon said the Bahrain facility was damaged due to a nearby drone strike, and two data centers in the UAE were directly hit by drones.
summary_public: Amazon said the Bahrain facility was damaged due to a nearby drone strike, and two data centers in the UAE were directly hit by drones.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Amazon's Bahrain data center targeted by Iran for support of U.S. military
